liveTotals.title: Live totals
liveTotals.subtitle: Request rate · Bandwidth · Sessions · CPU idle (always-live).

alerts.title: Active alerts
alerts.subtitle: Backends down, certs expiring, uncovered routes.

liveRate.title: Live request rate
liveRate.subtitle: req/s aggregated across all frontends + sparkline.

health.title: Backend health
health.subtitle: UP / DOWN / other counts per backend + per server.

tlsCoverage.title: TLS coverage
tlsCoverage.subtitle: Routes by cert status — valid / expiring / expired / missing.

geoOrigins.title: Top countries
geoOrigins.subtitle: Client request origins by country (requires GeoIP).

originMap.title: Origin map
originMap.subtitle: World choropleth shaded by client session count (requires GeoIP).

topClients.title: Top clients
topClients.subtitle: Per-IP breakdown with country / location (requires GeoIP for enrichment).

snapshotTimeline.title: Snapshot timeline
snapshotTimeline.subtitle: Last 8 state snapshots with relative timestamps.

httpcodes.title: HTTP status codes
httpcodes.subtitle: Donut chart of the sampled hour.

quickActions.title: Quick actions
quickActions.stopBody1Suffix: All proxied connections will be dropped immediately and the proxy will be unreachable until you start it again.
quickActions.directMode: Direct mode has no supervisor — patchpanel cannot restart HAProxy from the UI.
quickActions.restartHint: Restart available via the Start button.
quickActions.directStartDisabled: Direct strategy cannot start HAProxy — no supervisor configured.

socket.fallbackMessage: HAProxy may not be running yet, or the runtime socket is unreachable.

slowest.title: Slowest backends
slowest.sortedSuffix: (average response time over the last 1024 requests per backend).
slowest.empty: No backends with recorded response times.

httpCodes.title: HTTP status codes
httpCodes.noTraffic: No traffic in the sampled window yet.
httpCodes.distribution: Distribution across all frontends in the last hour (delta-based).

controls.clearCountersTitle: Reset all max/total counters via `clear counters all` on the runtime socket. Current sessions and rates are not affected; max/total/error counts reset to zero.

tables.title: Frontends / Backends / Servers
tables.description: Refreshes every 5 seconds. Rows are grouped by proxy (FRONTEND on top, BACKEND row at the bottom of each group). Per-server actions (Set ready / Drain / Maintenance / Set weight) and per-frontend actions (Enable / Disable / Set maxconn) apply via the HAProxy runtime stats socket — no reload needed. Hover any row's name for the per-row HTTP-code + queue/connect/response/total time breakdown.

trends.bytesHint: Bytes-per-second sampled every 5 seconds. Click the expand icon on any chart for a fullscreen view.

fetchingHour: Fetching the recent hour from HAProxy stats sampler…

prompt.weightHelp: 0 = drain new connections. Higher weight = more share of the load.
prompt.maxconnHelp: Hard cap on simultaneous connections this frontend will accept. 0 unlimited.

confirmClear.title: Clear all HAProxy counters?
confirmClear.body2: on the runtime socket. Max / total / error counters reset to zero across every frontend, backend, and server. Active sessions and rates are
confirmClear.body4: Useful for getting clean numbers after a deploy / load test. The action is logged to the audit trail.

table.groupLinkTitle: Jump to the Backends tab focused on this proxy
table.noFilterMatch: No rows match the current filter.

customize.title: Show / hide panels
customize.hint: Drag panels on the dashboard itself to reorder. Use the switches below to toggle visibility. The KPI tiles at the top stay always-visible.

panelLayout.title: Panel layout
panelLayout.clickHint: Click a cell to size the panel

alerts.title: Active alerts
alerts.allNominal: All systems nominal — no degraded backends, no expiring certs, every route is covered.
alerts.certNoLineage: Cert {{name}} has no lineage on disk
alerts.certNoLineageDetail: No PEM loaded — HAProxy can't serve TLS for this cert yet

tlsCoverage.title: TLS coverage
tlsCoverage.empty: No enabled routes yet. Add a route on the Routes tab to start.

topHosts.title: Top hosts (req/s)
topHosts.noTraffic: No traffic in the sampled window yet.

snapshots.title: Snapshot timeline
snapshots.empty: No snapshots yet. They accumulate as you save state.

geo.title: Top countries
geo.turnOnSuffix: to start resolving client IPs to countries.
geo.noActive: No active sessions yet. Origins aggregate here once public-IP traffic comes in.
geo.lanOnly: Only LAN / private-IP traffic right now ({{count}} session(s)). Private addresses don't resolve to a country. Public-IP sessions will show up here when they arrive.
geo.unresolvedPrefix: GeoIP is enabled but {{count}} public-IP session(s) couldn't be resolved.
geo.onlineFallbackPrefix: You're using online-only fallback ({{provider}}); check the addon logs for 'online geoip lookup failed' to see why the provider is rejecting requests (rate limit / bad token / network).
geo.noCountryResolved: No country-resolved sessions yet ({{priv}} private, {{unres}} unresolved).

originMap.title: Origin map
originMap.empty: No country-resolved sessions yet. Map populates as GeoIP resolves public-IP clients.

clients.title: Top clients
clients.empty: No active sessions yet. Clients aggregate here once traffic comes in.

topology.title: Topology
topology.description: Click any node to isolate its subgraph · double-click to open its edit page · hover to highlight the connected chain · drag to reposition (saved per-browser).
topology.layoutDirectionTitle: Graph layout direction (positions are saved per-direction)
topology.resetLayoutTitle: Clear saved node positions for current direction and re-run auto layout
topology.noNodes: No nodes visible. Either no routes are defined yet, or your filters exclude everything — clear the auth filter or search to see the full graph.

sessionsUnavailable: HAProxy session data is currently unavailable
